title: janoamaral/sparkle-cli
summary: sparkle-cli is an AI-native TUI bridge that integrates Ollama directly into your Zsh workflow. It’s designed for those who live in the terminal and want the power of LLMs (like Gemma 4) without the indignity of leaving the shell to open a browser.

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: A hive for your AI agents. Personal per user, shared per project, self-hosted, 24/7. Assistants that outlive your laptop's uptime.

title: tobocop2/obsidian-lilbee
summary: Chat with your notes, PDFs, code, and 150+ formats using local AI. Local-first semantic search, sync, and chat for your vault, powered by Ollama and lilbee. Nothing leaves your machine.

title: Senzo13/JoyBoy
summary: Local AI harness/workstation: local AI image editor, Ollama image generation routing, SDXL inpainting UI, CivitAI model imports, 8GB VRAM Stable Diffusion.

title: sasharif87/Personal-Training-App
summary: Self-hosted AI triathlon coaching engine — LLM-driven training plans, Garmin/Zwift integration, and physiological signal learning. Built for one athlete.

title: Galadriel-Tech-Solutions/Agent-Diff-Visualizer
summary: Semantic review workspace for large AI-generated git diffs. Groups changes into logical tasks and visualizes architectural impact with local-first LLM analysis.

title: jackrabbithanna/gnollama
summary: GNOME application providing GUI for Ollama

title: hogeheer499-commits/strix-halo-guide
summary: The definitive Strix Halo LLM guide — 65 t/s on a $2,999 mini PC. Live benchmarks, tested optimizations, and everything that doesn't work.

title: apocas/restai
summary: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: TheZupZup/Nova
summary: A self-hosted AI assistant with intelligent model routing

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: dAAAb/canfly-ai
summary: 🛫 Now You Can Fly — AI-native knowledge hub for AI Agent builders. Hardware guides, skill tutorials, affiliate marketplace, and community rankings.

title: BigBill1418/DroneOpsCommand
summary: Self-hosted mission management platform for commercial drone operators. AI report generation (Ollama/Mistral), invoicing, flight log import, PDF export, CRM, weather/airspace intel. Docker Compose full stack.

title: michaelalber/grounded-code-mcp
summary: Ground your AI coding agent in the books, standards, and docs you actually trust. A local MCP RAG server that makes your preferences the default.

title: singhpratech/notepatra
summary: Native C++/Rust code editor for the AI era — Linux/macOS/Windows, ~4 MB bare binary, 100+ file types, Rust-powered search, local AI via Ollama/llama.cpp/OpenAI-compatible. Free forever, GPL-3.0.

title: 7blacky7/synapse
summary: KI-Gedächtnis & Code-Intelligenz — Semantische Code-Suche, Wissensaustausch und Projekt-Pläne über MCP (Model Context Protocol). Verbindet lokale CLIs (Claude Code, Codex) und Web-KIs (Claude.ai) mit Qdrant + Ollama Embeddings.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: jcviau81/voxyflow
summary: Your personal AI bot for getting projects done. Execute tasks directly from kanban cards. Local-first: Claude Max, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible API.

title: christopherlhammer11-ai/hammerlock
summary: Privacy-first local AI assistant with 11 agents, AES-256 encryption, and full offline capability
